message:
feat(lab): add AutoAdvanceTermination to VirtualTimeReport

Introduces the AutoAdvanceTermination enum to distinguish why a
run_with_auto_advance simulation loop terminated:

  - Quiescent: no pending timers or tasks remain — the system reached
    a natural steady state
  - StepLimitReached: the configured maximum step count was hit before
    quiescence (useful for bounding long simulations)
  - StuckBailout: the simulation detected no forward progress after
    repeated advance attempts (prevents infinite loops in degenerate
    timer configurations)

The new termination field is added to VirtualTimeReport, making it
possible for callers to programmatically react to termination cause
rather than inferring it from elapsed time or step count heuristics.

Includes four new tests covering all three variants plus the stuck
bailout detection edge case, and updates two existing tests to supply
the new field.  Re-exports AutoAdvanceTermination from lab/mod.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
